Name: LACK_OF_STATS_PARAM
Description: Defines scaling limits and penalties applied when the player lacks the required stats or stamina to properly use equipment, actions, or abilities.

Fields.Name: Minimum Value When Stats Are Insufficient
Fields.Description: Lower bound applied when character attributes are below the required values.

Fields.Name: Maximum Value When Stats Are Insufficient
Fields.Description: Upper bound applied when character attributes are below the required values.

Fields.Name: Minimum Value When Stamina Is Insufficient
Fields.Description: Lower bound applied when stamina is too low to perform an action effectively.

Fields.Name: Maximum Value When Stamina Is Insufficient
Fields.Description: Upper bound applied when stamina is too low to perform an action effectively.
